calendar.matters:
Petitioners Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-22-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Andrew Ziaja of Leonard Carder LLP (510-272-0169) appears as counsel for petitioner/moving party

Deputy City Attorney, Jonathan Yank, Esq. (415-554-3816) appears as counsel for respondent/opposing party

Court summarizes issues and the matter is argued by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

PETITIONER INTERNATIONAL FEDERATION OF PROFESSIONAL AND TECHNICAL ENGINEERS, LOCAL 21'S Motion To Compel Arbitration is taken under submission as of this date.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, bus. tel: (530) 339-5023, email: rhunter@sftc.org. (D302)

---------------

OFF THE RECORD: Later this same date, the Court rules. PETITIONER INTERNATIONAL FEDERATION OF PROFESSIONAL AND TECHNICAL ENGINEERS, LOCAL 21'S Motion To Compel Arbitration is DENIED per written order filed August 22, 2016.

Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (Do302)t Reported (D302)
